mapper.select: SELECT `t1`.`id` AS commentId, `t1`.`feed_id` AS feedId, `t1`.`user_id` AS userId, `t1`.`parent_comment_id` AS parentCommentId, `t1`.`content` AS content, `t1`.`created_at` AS createdAt, `t1`.`updated_at` AS updatedAt, `t2`.`nickname` AS nickname, `t3`.image_url AS profileImageUrl FROM `petlog`.`feed_comment` AS `t1` JOIN petlog.personal_user AS `t2` ON `t1`.user_id = `t2`.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`pets` AS `t3` ON `t1`.user_id = `t3`.`user_id` AND `t3`.`is_primary` = 1 WHERE `t1`.feed_id = #{feedId} ORDER BY COALESCE(`t1`.parent_comment_id, `t1`.id), `t1`.parent_comment_id IS NOT NULL, `t1`.created_at
